summary: br-create-validated.sh now registers inline description temp files and removes them on EXIT/ERR, so failed AG validation does not leave temporary markdown files behind.
why_flywheel_centric: br-create-validated.sh is the Flywheel-owned wrapper for creating Beads with canonical AG gates. Hardening its cleanup path improves the work-intake surface used across the ecosystem.

proof.summary: Existing AG-format and wrapper-source-repo fixtures pass, plus a new failing inline --description validation proves no br-create-validated temp file remains.
Wrapper-created Beads still canonicalize source_repo after the cleanup change.
Syntax and ShellCheck are clean for the edited script and regression test.
Scoped operational shell inventory moved to with_trap=97, without_trap=285, coverage_pct=25.39.
No whitespace errors and no active dependency cycles.

residuals.summary: Full no-git secret scan reports existing repository findings unrelated to this patch. Staged-diff secret scan must be used before push for this slice.
